name: Agent Guard
description: Automatic loop detection and state verification via plugin hooks — Layer 3-4 of Tool-Use Reliability Stack

loopWindowMs.description: Time window in ms to look back for loop detection

loopThreshold.description: Number of repeated actions within window to trigger loop detection

maxConsecutiveErrors.description: Number of consecutive errors to trigger error loop detection

blockOnLoop.description: Whether to block tool calls when a loop is detected (true = hard stop, false = warn only)

stateVerification.description: Enable Layer 3-4 state verification after tool calls

verifyBlockThreshold.description: Number of consecutive verification failures before blocking
